content: React 19.2.7 is current stable. Vite 8.1.0 is current (requires Node 20.19+ or 22.12+). Tailwind CSS 4.3.1 is current stable with CSS-first config via @theme directive replacing tailwind.config.js. @tailwindcss/vite 4.3.1 replaces PostCSS setup for Vite projects. @vitejs/plugin-react 6.0.3 requires Vite 8+; uses Oxc for React Refresh, no Babel dependency. Key breaking change: Tailwind 4 uses CSS @import instead of JS config file. shadcn/ui updated for Tailwind v4 + React 19.
